meta.name: European Cup / Champions League — finalists & semi-finalists
meta.scope: Winner, runner-up and both semi-finalists of every edition 1955-56 to 2025-26
meta.note: Tier-O staging index. Promoted finalists/SFs removed as they became pickable (global O/P de-dup sweep, 14 Jun 2026). Trends toward empty as promotion completes.
